title: Smart grid data compression and reconstruction by wavelet packet transform
author: Jadhav, Mahajan
materials: The coefficients Ckmm can have soft or hard-threshold.

steps.title: It decomposes the signal a0 using...
steps.instruction: It decomposes the signal a0 using a db3 wavelet at level 1 by DWT into approximation coefficients a11 and detail coefficients d

steps.title: It further disintegrates the approximation a11...
steps.instruction: It further disintegrates the approximation a11 into approximation coefficients a32 and detail coefficients d42 using db2 wavelet by DWT at level

steps.title: The detail coefficients d21decomposes from level...
steps.instruction: The detail coefficients d21decomposes from level 1 into approximation a52 and detail coefficients d62 using the db2 wavelet by DWT at level

steps.title: It further decays the approximation coefficients...
steps.instruction: It further decays the approximation coefficients a32 into a73 and d83, and detail coefficients d42 into a93 and d103 from level 2 using db1 wavelets by DWT at level

steps.title: Similarly, a52 and d62 are decomposed...
steps.instruction: Similarly, a52 and d62 are decomposed further from level 2 to level 3 by DWT using db1.Fig. 1Decomposition by Proposed design using wavelet packet transform.Fig. 1Fig. 2Reconstruction by Proposed design using wavelet packet transform.Fig. 2

steps.title: into coefficients d833, a933 and d1033...
steps.instruction: into coefficients d833, a933 and d1033 and a1133, d1233, a1333, and d1433 respectively. The coefficient a322 is reconstructed by IDWT using db1 for the coefficients a73 and d833 at level

steps.title: The coefficient d422 is recreated by...
steps.instruction: The coefficient d422 is recreated by IDWT using db1 for the coefficients a933 and d1033 at level

steps.title: Similarly, the coefficients a522 and d622...
steps.instruction: Similarly, the coefficients a522 and d622 are regenerated at level three by IDWT using db1 wavelet. The coefficient a111 is reconstructed by IDWT using db2 for the coefficients a322 and d422 at level

steps.title: The coefficient d211 is recreated by...
steps.instruction: The coefficient d211 is recreated by IDWT using db2 for the coefficients a522 and d622 at level

steps.title: Finally, the coefficient a00 is regenerated...
steps.instruction: Finally, the coefficient a00 is regenerated by IDWT using db3 for the coefficients a111 and d211 at level

steps.title: The non-zero coefficients are the summation...
steps.instruction: The non-zero coefficients are the summation of pure approximation coefficients at level 3, a73, other coefficients d833, a933 and d1033 and a1133, d1233,a1333, and d1433at level 3 after applying threshold.

description: The energy requirement is increasing due to the rise in population. Conventional sources supply most of the demand, constantly reducing and causing severe environmental problems. The existing power grid is unpredictable, inferior, and provides insufficient electricity. The smart Grid is an improvement growing with various technologies [1]. The distribution network will install many smart monitors and meters to allow comprehensive and actual data observation. It requires computations and communication to process and share details. Hence it needs low data storage and adequate bandwidth for transmission. There are lossless and lossy techniques used in compression. It distorts the reconstructed signal in the lossy compression method. The Wavelet transforms under lossy methods are well with time and frequency localization. It is renowned for compressing variable frequency signals, non-periodic and transients, and describing the data with few coefficients [[2], [3], [4]]. The electrical signal disturbances are voltage fluctuations, sag, swell, harmonics, impulse, etc., employing wavelet transform to segment [5]. Wavelet Transform and the flexible threshold separate the disturbances like variable voltage, transients with impulse and oscillations, and distortions in the harmonic[[6], [7]]. Phasor Measurement Unit (PMU) signal compression using wavelet transform with Daubechies 2 is better than Coiflet 1 wavelet [8]. Discrete wavelet transform(DWT) and wavelet packet transform (WPT) compress and reconstruct the data by threshold. The minimum description length (MDL) decides the suitable wavelet and most coefficients for signal reconstruction [[9], [10]]. Compressing and reconstructing actual and simulated oscillations decide a suitable scale and wavelet for decomposing data [11]. Wavelet Transform effectively compresses the voltage sag signal in the smart grid [12]. It compresses and analyzes data using wavelet transform [[13], [14], [15], [16]]. It compresses and denoises s
